rag_rules: Use assign only when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable in implementation scope.
generic_rules: Trace the first unresolved identifier or invalid helper declaration on the same line when AGREE reports type errors.
Align the helper declaration type with the expression to fix type mismatches.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex in guarantee expressions.
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope.
Avoid introducing package-qualified identifiers, data types, or property references that are absent from the analyzed model and its configured dependencies.
irrelevant_topics: Compact requirement semantics and model traceability
